name: @mitocube/api-hooks
author: Hendrik Nolte <h.nolte@age.mpg.de> (http://github.com/hnolcol)
description: Hooks for API calls to the MitoCube backend. The package requires a functional MitoCube backend (hnolcol/mitocube-backend) due to implemented API calls to retrieve information about attributes/otologies and genotypes as well as proteins. Authorization should be handled using the axios default settings Authorization Header ('Bearer ...').
